repair_history.diagnosis:
Couldn't resolve reference to 'impl'.: AGREE expressions incorrectly reference 'Consumer.impl' as a value instead of using valid component type identifiers or properties -> Replace 'Consumer.impl' with 'Consumer' in all assume/guarantee expressions
left and right sides of binary expression '=' are of type '<error>' and 'int', but must be of the same type: Invalid syntax where 'Consumer.impl' is treated as a type or value in comparisons -> Replace 'Consumer.impl = 1000 ms' with 'Consumer = 1000 ms' and similar for other constraints
Expression for assume statement is of type 'int' but must be of type 'bool': Numeric expressions used where boolean conditions are required -> Remove the numeric expressions that are not boolean conditions
extraneous input 'ms' expecting ';': Invalid time unit syntax in AGREE expressions -> Remove 'ms' from all expressions and use integer values directly

/CaseProject/modified_model.aadl | line 46: left and right sides of binary expression '=' are of type '<error>' and 'int', but must be of the same type: Consumer is an AADL component name, not a numeric expression; AGREE cannot interpret it as a value -> replace 'Consumer' with 'Period' in all expressions to reference the AADL Period property
/CaseProject/modified_model.aadl | line 47: left and right sides of binary expression '<=' are of type '<error>' and 'int', but must be of the same type: Consumer is an AADL component name, not a numeric expression; AGREE cannot interpret it as a value -> replace 'Consumer' with 'Period' in all expressions to reference the AADL Period property
/CaseProject/modified_model.aadl | line 48: left and right sides of binary expression '<=' are of type 'int' and '<error>', but must be of the same type: Consumer is an AADL component name, not a numeric expression; AGREE cannot interpret it as a value -> replace 'Consumer' with 'Compute_Execution_Time' to reference the AADL Compute_Execution_Time property
/CaseProject/modified_model.aadl | line 49: left and right sides of binary expression '=' are of type '<error>' and 'int', but must be of the same type: Consumer is an AADL component name, not a numeric expression; AGREE cannot interpret it as a value -> replace 'Consumer' with 'Priority' to reference the AADL Priority property
/CaseProject/modified_model.aadl | line 50: left and right sides of binary expression '=' are of type '<error>' and 'int', but must be of the same type: Consumer is an AADL component name, not a numeric expression; AGREE cannot interpret it as a value -> replace 'Consumer' with 'Period' in all expressions to reference the AADL Period property

Couldn't resolve reference to 'Period'.: AGREE annex is in thread type scope but references properties defined at implementation level -> Move the AGREE annex to the thread implementation Consumer.impl
Couldn't resolve reference to 'Compute_Execution_Time'.: AGREE annex is in thread type scope but references properties defined at implementation level -> Move the AGREE annex to the thread implementation Consumer.impl
Couldn't resolve reference to 'Priority'.: AGREE annex is in thread type scope but references properties defined at implementation level -> Move the AGREE annex to the thread implementation Consumer.impl

Couldn't resolve reference to 'Period'.: AGREE annex is in thread type scope but references implementation properties -> Move annex to Consumer.impl scope
Couldn't resolve reference to 'Priority'.: AGREE annex is in thread type scope but references implementation properties -> Move annex to Consumer.impl scope
Expression for assume statement is of type 'int' but must be of type 'bool': Invalid boolean expression syntax in AGREE -> Rewrite 0 ms <= Compute_Execution_Time <= 3 ms as a valid boolean expression
